query:
SELECT e.id as evidencia_id, e.actionId, e.status, e.descricao, a.id as action_exists, a.titulo as action_titulo
FROM evidences e 
LEFT JOIN actions a ON e.actionId = a.id 
WHERE e.status = 'pendente'
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT e.id as evidencia_id, e.actionId, e.status, e.descricao, a.id as action_exists, a.titulo as action_titulo
FROM evidences e

WHERE e.status = 'pendente'
LIMIT 10;
